title: Bajaj Energy Preparatory Meeting
summary: ## Meeting Purpose Finalize strategy for a last-minute Bajaj Energy AI pitch. ## Key Takeaways - **Urgent Pitch:** Bajaj contact Ashish Joshi needs a presentation for his management today (Saturday) on AI possibilities for their Muradabad plant. - **Strategic Pivot:** The team will pivot from a detailed proposal to a high-level 'AI Intervention Possibilities' document. - **Rationale:** Protect proprietary knowledge from competitors (e.g., Uptime AI) while helping the contact prepare for his internal meeting. - **Immediate Action:** Siddharth will call the contact to offer coaching and secure a face-to-face meeting next week. - **Project Lead:** ModAE will lead the project, leveraging its power plant experience. The plant has five units, each with two 45 MW steam turbines and two boilers. Primary competitor is Uptime AI (Infinite Uptime), focus on rotating assets.

title: Impromptu Zoom Meeting - Dr Sandeep Neurosurgeon
summary: ## Meeting Purpose Explore professional collaboration and referral opportunities. ## Key Takeaways - **Dr. Murali (Orthopedic Surgeon)** runs an AI company building AI-native software for large organizations (Dubai gov't, Mahametro). - **Sandeep (Neurosurgeon)** is Director of Neurosurgery at Max Hospital, specializing in complex brain tumors (>1,800 surgeries) using neuro-navigation. - **Referral Needs:** Sandeep seeks referrals for brain tumors and trigeminal neuralgia; Dr. Murali seeks clients for his AI-native hospital management software. - **Action:** Follow-up meeting scheduled for after Sandeep's trip to Bali.

title: Bajaj Meeting BT
summary: ## Meeting Purpose Strategize for Bajaj Power AI pitch and plan Siemens PLC retrofit. ## Key Takeaways - **Bajaj Power Pitch:** Differentiate from Uptime AI by expanding from maintenance-only to holistic production & operational excellence covering all asset types. - **VLCM3 PLC Retrofit:** Siemens S7-1500 upgrade planned. 4-month lead time for hardware is critical risk — check stock and alternatives (Schneider, Fuji). - **Boiler PID AI:** AI-driven tuning for sluggish boiler PID loops is key value-add. Addresses degradation from mechanical wear (valves, actuators) and material aging. - Goal: production & operational excellence platform, not just monitoring. Scope: mechanical, electrical, and static assets (boilers, vessels).

title: BT haritha
summary: ### Pending tasks and Slack review BT and BK discussed pending tasks accumulated while BK was at emergency. Hetzka document sharing done; Linguska payment transfer confirmed. ### NeuroQ proposal NeuroQ requested reverse engineering work. Original quote 9,000 dirham revised down to 7,000. NeuroQ wants 'Check My Brain' (brainagecheckup.com) functionality. Proposal: keep 7,000 base + two separate 2,000 dirham line items (one for BrainAgeCheckup.com reverse engineering, one for probability calculator). ### Linkist handoff Linkist project nearly ready for handoff. Google and Apple Wallet payment integration complete. Account transferring to Liju, needs credit card details. Testing pending from Neeraj. Goal: complete handoff tomorrow.

title: BT haritha Microsoft Teams
summary: ### Agreement status Other agreement comments expected by Monday. ### Proposify failures Haritha attempted to upload/edit proposal (5,90,000) in Proposify but encountered repeated technical failures: import failed, exports blank. Decision: edit proposals externally and send directly to BK as final, copy to Slack. ### NeuroQ proposal complexity Three advance invoices to be submitted to Dr. Shweta. Initial proposal 7,500 → reverse engineering added → brainagecheckup.com mentioned. Need clarification from Dr. Shweta's email.

title: NeuroQ Proposal Revision
summary: ### Proposal revision and pricing Key changes: remove reverse engineering details (PNDA, AI engine, biomarker engine, topo mapping) from proposal, eliminate price breakup to prevent line-item negotiation, remove patient portal from QEEG system. Report format must use doctor's jargon, not technical language. Original 7,500 (included 2,000 for reverse engineering) reduced to 7,000. Report template creation, design, and deployment included. ### Grant application Upcoming deadline. ### Server infrastructure Client provides VMs via Hyper-V. Aman is hardware engineer.

title: Huzaifa dubai media
summary: ### Dashboard Architecture Dr. BK presented Flow Excel dashboard with sections: pending, approval, rejected, completed. Multiple view options (grid, list, compact, timeline, calendar, person, split), responsive. Prefetch+cache for performance. Super admins see all requests; regular users see assigned tasks. ### Consolidating Views Haritha: users should not navigate multiple pages. Goal: single unified dashboard. Decision: remove old dashboard, keep only modern dashboard. ### Role-Based Filters Three filters: Created by me, Pending with me, all approvals.

title: stakes
summary: ### Budget allocation 83,000 added to budget as third-party charges for cloud services (OpEx). ### Bajaj power plant AI BT introduced significant new opportunity from Bajaj — AI system for five identical power plants. Scoping questionnaire sent. Solving for one plant replicates across other four. ### Mod A deal closure After extensive negotiation: 5,78,000 (plus GST). Quarterly payments in advance (1,44,500 per quarter), one-year support/warranty/maintenance included, multi-year agreement starting year two with AMC charges decided Q4. ### Pricing strategy BT emphasized joint decision-making on pricing.

title: Patient Booking System
summary: ### Software integration Direct connection not necessary. Create separate module, manually download reports periodically, upload to new software. ### Patient appointment booking Patient self-service: log in, schedule appointments. Display doctor time slots (10 AM-2 PM OPD). Implement overbooking (3 patients per 1-hour slot) to handle no-shows. ### Chatbot workflow Instead of direct booking, chatbot engages patients conversationally — identify preferred doctors, present available facilities/timings. Either book directly or collect patient info and trigger callback. Hybrid: automation + human verification.

title: Product Company Pivot
summary: ### Strategic pivot to product company Transitioning from services to product company. Six flagship products across three categories: two engineering, two medical, two other. Each must be world-class, enterprise-grade, with marketing materials (demos, videos, evidence). ### P&ID Extractor AI-powered tool for industrial plants — analyzes engineering drawings, identifies/catalogs valves (ball, butterfly), pipelines, chemical treatments using international standardized symbols. Creates inventory, generates maintenance schedules, spare parts lists. ### Pune Metro compliance verification AI verification layer for architectural drawings used in Pune Metro construction. Checks MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) compliance.

title: PIMS / PNID Extractor Status

BT reformatted: introduction with pain points, technology description, technical evaluation, business evaluation, risk analysis, trial details. ### Problem statement Asset information management currently dependent on manual workflows, disconnected practices, non-standard document preparation. Solution: centralized platform with standardized workflows, role-based task allocation, progress tracking, automated notifications. ### Maintenance scope Beyond P&ID extraction (feeds data into Excel → Maximo or SAP), must address comprehensive maintenance for all extracted assets.

title: AI-Native Org Vision
summary: ### Obsidian as AI-readable knowledge base Demonstrated Obsidian as markdown-based file system with interlinked documents, tags, labels. Obsidian Web Clipper extracts video transcripts (Google Gemini Plus Notebook LM). Git integration for version control. Connects to Slack for real-time notifications. ### AI agent pharmacy demo Practical automation: AI agent accessed hospital management software DB and Obsidian vault containing SOPs. Compared critical drug inventory (adrenaline, atropine) against SOP minimum 500 units, found zero stock, automatically ordered from suppliers. Slack notifications confirmed. ### AI-native company principles Use only Obsidian (markdown), Slack (messaging with full history), Zoom (with note-taking). Eliminate WhatsApp, email, phone calls.

title: AI-Native OS Three-Step Framework
summary: ### Production hardening Sahil noted test cases failed, PDA kept local. ### AI-native operating system vision Dr. Murali BK: transform company to AI-native organization where 60-80% workflows are automated by AI agents. Three-step framework: (1) Learn — build management conviction and understand AI capabilities; (2) Build Business Brain — document all organizational knowledge in queryable markdown; (3) Automate — create AI agents with specific skills per department. Goal: 80% automation within one year. ### Step 2 deep dive Critical step — create business brain through documentation of all org knowledge in markdown.

title: AI Models for Drawing Analysis

Claude good for general vision; specialized models better for technical/architectural drawings. No single engine for all tasks — mix-and-match for Pune Metro compliance. ### Image-to-JSON pipeline Convert architectural drawings to JSON using specialized vision engines, apply Claude Opus 4.7 for reasoning and compliance checking. Extract features and technical details into structured JSON.

title: BNI 121 - Manika Gupta Chemistry
summary: ### Chemistry exam content Substance reacts with analyst region to produce pink/reddish color (portfolio region reaction). Para-methyl-amino-benzaldehyde — frequently tested. ### Lab procedure Heat and cool sample, mix 5 ml urine + 5 ml reagent, sit 3 minutes. Add 2 ml saturated sodium acid for extraction, pH adjust to 6-6. Equal amounts urine and reagent, 2 ml sodium acetate, 4 ml chloroform sequentially.
